market_pulse: Competitive activity stable; LIV leading with recent Dombresky/Cloonee momentum while competitors focus on residencies and special events.

content_gaps.description: XS, OMNIA, and Encore actively promoting resident DJ schedules with personality-driven content; LIV mixing personalities with artist announcements.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase behind-the-scenes storytelling from John Summit, emphasize unique Fontainebleau location advantage.

content_gaps.description: Competitors leveraging TikTok for visitor reviews and outfit guides; LIV Beach gaining traction via user posts but room for growth.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create LIV-specific hashtag challenge for dayclubbers; incentivize TikTok creators to share outfit/experience reels.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA using event countdowns and Latin event theming; LIV occasionally mentions upcoming weekends but lacks persistent countdown strategy.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post 3x/week countdown stories for weekend headliners starting Thursday.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest reviews of both LIV Nightclub and XS Nightclub as guest list visitor; high engagement (591 likes on LIV review).
Posted viral OMNIA main room content (2.3M likes); created trending chandelier highlight video; strong EDM audience.
Posted 60-second dayclub walkthrough of LIV Beach showing pool/layout; engagement marker for new-venue explorers.

story_activity.summary: Last week (April 10-12) featured Dombresky, Cloonee, Marcos Trous—strong tech-house and house lineup momentum.
Upcoming April lineup includes Follow the Fish (4/11), Deseo Latin Sundays (4/12), DJ Rob Guson (4/14), Zedd (4/17), DeOrro (4/18).
